scenarios.docBefore:
# Project Overview

## Introduction

This project aims to build a better markdown editor.

## Goals

- Ship version 1 by Q3
- Achieve 100 daily active users
- Support three AI providers

# Technical Spec
## Introduction

The purpose of this document is to provide a technical specification for a markdown editor.
This document outlines the features, functionality, and architecture of the editor.
## Architecture

The system uses three layers.
